Package com.emc.rest.smart

Class SmartConfig

java.lang.Object
com.emc.rest.smart.SmartConfig
public class SmartConfig extends Object
Houses configuration for the smart client.

      public int getPollInterval()

    • setPollInterval

      public void setPollInterval(int pollInterval)
      Set the interval in seconds to wait between polling for active nodes. Defaults to 120 seconds (2 minutes).

    • isHostUpdateEnabled

      public boolean isHostUpdateEnabled()

    • setHostUpdateEnabled

      public void setProperty(String propName, Object value)
      Allows custom Jersey client properties to be set. These will be passed on in the Jersey ClientConfig

    • getMaxRetryAttempts

      public int getMaxRetryAttempts()

    • setMaxRetryAttempts

      public void setMaxRetryAttempts(int maxRetryAttempts)
      Set the maximum number of retry attempts for connection-level errors (e.g. connect timeout, connection refused). The smart client will transparently retry with the next healthy host. Defaults to 2.

    • withMaxRetryAttempts

      public SmartConfig withMaxRetryAttempts(int maxRetryAttempts)

    • withProperty

      public SmartConfig withProperty(String propName, Object value)
